texto: The minds of people are so cluttered up with every-day living these days that they don't or won't take time out for a little prayer-for mental cleansing just as they take a bath for physical outer cleansing. Both are necessary.
explicacao: Citação de Jo Ann Carlson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The minds of people are so cluttered up with every-day living these days that they don't or won't…” articula reflexao, prayer, cleansing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
